subject: DevOps
title: DevSecOps Maturity Model
description: A quick, practical guide to DevSecOps Maturity Model.

hook.text: You can't reach full DevSecOps overnight. It's a journey with clear stages of maturity.

buildup.text: Level 1: ad-hoc security, manual reviews. Level 2: basic CI/CD scanning, some secret management.

discovery.text: Level 3: automated gates, policy as code, SBOMs, and regular threat modeling. Security per sprint.

twist.text: Level 4: security is invisible. Built into every tool and process. Devs barely notice the guardrails.

climax.text: Measure progress: scan coverage, remediation time, secrets in vault, audit pass rate.

punchline.text: Start where you are. Improve one level at a time. It's a journey.

quiz.question: What characterizes the highest level of DevSecOps maturity?
options: Security is built into every tool and process so seamlessly that developers barely notice it
The team has the most expensive security tools
Security is handled entirely by an external vendor
